loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate PQ health via roster_spec; individual scalar fields (I-THD/V-THD counts, worst values) are computed by the panel_aggregate renderer from member meters, not emitted as direct fields.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder THD and event counts from member meters; panel-level THD limits and PF floors are static config defaults as nameplate ratings are unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing current THD (thd_compliance_i_avg) and power metrics; voltage THD (thd_compliance_v_avg) and harmonic orders (h3/h5/h7) are not measured by this meter and are omitted.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing current THD (iThd) — voltage THD (vThd) is not measured for this asset (columns failed validation).

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) and power (kW) — voltage THD (V-THD) and k-factor are not measured for this asset.
